---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for gooq
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem or motivation

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case that is currently
difficult or impossible with gooq.

## Proposed API sketch

Outline the API you have in mind. Concrete code is preferred over prose.

```go
// Illustrative sketch of the proposed API.
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches, workarounds, or existing features you
evaluated and why they are insufficient.

## Additional context

Any other information, references, or examples that support the request.
